questionHtml: A student records the time for 20 oscillations of the rod. Explain how this procedure leads to a more precise measurement of the time for one oscillation T.
markschemeHtml:
measured uncertainties «for one oscillation and for 20 oscillations» are the same/similar/OWTTE

OR

% uncertainty is less for 20 oscillations than for one ✔

 

dividing «by 20» / finding mean reduces the random error ✔

meta.title: A student records the time for 20 oscillations of the rod. Explain how this procedure leads to a more precise measurement of the time for one oscillation T.
